author: Boxi Yu
name: Non-record: 11L Complement Training + TTT + No-JEPA
blurb: Complement Training + TTT (Test-Time Training) + No-JEPA on 8xA100. Complement Training downweights loss for tokens that bigram can predict, allowing transformer to focus on hard tokens. val_bpb 1.0855 significantly beats SOTA 1.1228.
